abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (AI) is poised to transform how brands communicate with consumers. Recent research demonstrates AI's benefits in producing text, but marketing research has not yet explored how marketers can leverage AI to create visual advertising. Despite their impressive capabilities, “off-the-shelf” generative AI models are not aligned with marketing objectives, raising the question of whether it is possible to fine-tune generative AI directly on conventional advertising objectives (e.g., evoking attention, driving interest). In this research, the authors train an open-source generative AI model on marketing mindset metrics and show that the resulting visual content can match and even exceed conventionally produced advertising content in associated performance metrics. The results demonstrate that generative AI can be fine-tuned on multiple communication objectives simultaneously and adapted to specific audiences. In addition to highlighting generative AI's potential in marketing, this article explores the limitations of aligning visual generative AI with marketing objectives.

ob.ai_reason: 视觉生成AI创建广告，核心AI议题
ob.tldr: 生成式AI在视觉广告创作中的应用潜力待挖掘。研究者以开源模型为基础，用营销思维指标微调，训练出可匹配甚至超越传统制作广告的视觉内容。结果显示生成式AI能同时优化多重传播目标（如吸引注意、激发兴趣），并针对不同受众定制内容，验证了其在营销沟通中的可行性，同时指出与营销目标对齐的局限。

ur.ai_reason: 生成式AI创作视觉广告，含消费者参与但核心是算法优化
ur.tldr: 生成式AI可被微调以直接服务于营销目标。研究在开源生成式AI模型上训练注意力、兴趣唤起等营销指标，结果显示AI生成的视觉内容在相关性能指标上可匹配甚至超越传统广告。AI可同时针对多个传播目标微调并适配特定受众，同时揭示了视觉生成AI与营销目标对齐的局限性。

title: Picture Perfect: Engaging Customers with Visual Generative AI
title_zh: 视觉生成式AI的客户参与策略研究
